message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the west and should be in the moderate price range
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 2 people and 3 nights starting from tuesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve indian food and should be in the same price range as the hotel
The restaurant should be in the same area as the hotel
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 17:00 on the same day
If the booking fails how about 16:00
Make sure you get the reference number
